description_long: This object is a potted flowering plant featuring numerous delicate, ruffled pink blossoms with subtle white highlights, densely clustered above a mass of dark green, ovate leaves. The flowers are distributed evenly around the plant, creating a lush, rounded appearance. The petals are layered and slightly curled, giving the blooms a full, textured look. The plant is housed in a dark, textured pot that appears to be made of ceramic or clay, with a slightly rough surface. The foliage is dense, with leaves overlapping and providing a rich green backdrop to the pastel flowers. This arrangement is typical of ornamental plants used for urban decoration in parks, sidewalks, or building entrances.
description: A lush potted plant with ruffled pink flowers and dense dark green leaves in a textured dark pot. The blooms are full and layered, creating a vibrant ornamental display.
description_view_0: Front view shows a dense cluster of pink flowers and green leaves, with the pot fully visible at the base.
description_view_1: This angle highlights more unopened buds and a slightly fuller display of flowers on the right side.
description_view_2: The left side reveals a prominent large bloom and a more even distribution of flowers and leaves.
description_view_3: This view shows a concentration of flowers on the left, with the pot's texture clearly visible.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a whorled, overlapping configuration, forming dense, rounded blooms with a layered appearance. The arrangement is generally radial with some asymmetry due to overlapping and curling.
